basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli has released the official notification for 1 Temporary Faculty posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: OBC - 3 years, SC/ST - 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in desired area of specification with B.Tech./B.E. in Civil Engineering and M.Tech/M.E. in CTM/CEM/IEM/Project Management
qualification.details: PhD in desired area of specification with B.Tech./B.E. in Civil Engineering and M.Tech/M.E. in Construction Technology and Management (CTM), Construction Engineering and Management (CEM), Infrastructure Engineering and Management (IEM), and Project Management with knowledge in Project Planning & Control, Contract Management, Construction Economics & Finance, Construction Automation, Construction Quality & Safety Management, Software tools including MSP, Primavera and building information Modelling Tools.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Trichy Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PhD in desired area of specification with B.Tech./B.E. in Civil Engineering and M.Tech/M.E. in Construction Technology and Management (CTM), Construction Engineering and Management (CEM), Infrastructure Engineering and Management (IEM), and Project Management with knowledge in Project Planning & Control, Contract Management, Construction Economics & Finance, Construction Automation, Construction Quality & Safety Management, Software tools including MSP, Primavera and building information Modelling Tools.

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: OBC - 3 years, SC/ST - 5 years

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty positions is 09 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Temporary Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in the desired area of specification, along with a B.Tech./B.E. in Civil Engineering and an M.Tech/M.E. in CTM, CEM, IEM, or Project Management.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Temporary Faculty position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC (3 years) and SC/ST (5 years) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Faculty role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Trichy Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Temporary Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Temporary Faculty position at NIT Trichy will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITT/CE/L&T-CTM/2026-27/01.

faq.question: Q9. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.
